modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues printing PDFs on Windows with Adobe Acrobat.

full_description_text:
- The technician is unable to print PDFs while other documents print fine.  
- When attempting to print, the output only covers a quarter of the page.  
- Some pages are also printing in the wrong orientation, causing further issues.  
- An error message appears stating that an error occurred while printing the document.
